name: get_repo_info
description:
Fetches metadata and structure of a GitHub repository — description, language, stars, forks, branches, topics, and top contributors. Token optional for public repos.
Use when: user asks for an overview of a GitHub repo, wants to understand its structure, or needs branch/contributor information.
Scope: remote GitHub API. Token optional for public repos, required for private repos.
Not for: fetching file contents (use get_file), searching code (use search_code), or analyzing local git history (use analyze_commits).
